title: thymus saturejoides subsp. saturejoides
intro: Thymus saturejoides subsp. saturejoides, commonly known as the Spanish thyme, is a perennial plant native to the Iberian Peninsula and North Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Thymus saturejoides subsp. saturejoides include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and support the immune system, as well as its potential to exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or essential oils, which can be used to relieve respiratory issues, promote relaxation, and soothe skin irritations.
